name: Merry Cherry Chocolate Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat cream cheese with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
2. Gradually add confectioners' sugar while continuing to beat until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
3. Reserve 12 whole cherries and coarsely chop the remaining ones.
4. Reserve 1 cup (72 pecans) and coarsely chop the leftover pecan halves.
5. In a small bowl, combine 3/4 cup of the cream cheese frosting with the chopped pecans and cherries.
6. Using the end of a wooden spoon, make a 1-inch deep hole at the top of each cooled cupcake.
7. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the pecan filling into each hole.
8. Frost the tops of the cupcakes with the remaining cream cheese frosting.
9. Halve the reserved cherries and top the cupcakes with them.
10. Top the cupcakes with the reserved pecan halves.
11. Refrigerate until serving time.
